title: Luffy and Zoro Refuse to Fight
description: The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, this scene centers on Nami, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The log pose started pointing up...

summary: The Straw Hats enter Jaya’s rough pirate port, where rumors, salvage crews, and violent pirates make the dream of Sky Island look foolish.
